Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "ESCAPEFROMARTH-C400-4000" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Escape from Arth.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C400 which sets the execution address of the interrupt service routine (at $0314) to $0340. This allows the game to run correctly.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $49E0. However the true start address is $4000.
